chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1234 - وَ رَوَى اَلْفَضْلُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَلْمَلِكِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِذَا أَدْرَكَ اَلرَّجُلُ رَكْعَةً فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْجُمُعَةَ وَ إِنْ فَاتَتْهُ فَلْيُصَلِّ أَرْبَعاً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1234 - Al-Fadl ibn Abd al-Malik narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"If a person catches one rak'ah (of the Jumu’ah prayer), he has caught the Jumu’ah prayer. If he misses it, he should pray four (rak'ahs)."
